import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; function Home({ showSidebar, sidebarGender, setShowSidebar, setSidebarGender }) { const subCategoryItems = [ 'New Arrivals', 'Featured', 'Best Sellers', 'Sale', 'Sustainable' ]; return (
{/* Video Section */}
{/* Video Background */} {/* Dark overlay */}
{/* Text overlay - no background bar */}
{/* Season text */}

ONLY RAW MATERIAL ALLOWED.

{/* Browse collection link */} BROWSE COLLECTION
{/* Sliding Sidebar Overlay */} {showSidebar && (
setShowSidebar(false)} /> )} {/* Sidebar Panel */}
{/* Close Button */} {/* Sidebar Title */}

All {sidebarGender} Clothing

{/* Subcategories */}
{subCategoryItems.map((item) => (
e.target.style.color = '#999'} onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = '#000'} > {item}
))}
{/* Description at bottom */}
Discover our latest premium {sidebarGender.toLowerCase()} collection crafted from the finest materials.
{/* Images Section */}
{/* Picture 1 */}

COLLECTION 1

{/* Picture 2 */}

COLLECTION 2

{/* Picture 3 */}

COLLECTION 3

{/* Picture 4 */}

COLLECTION 4

); } export default Home;
